summary: Harden performance regression gating by rejecting invalid baselines, stabilizing fg03/fg08 benchmark behavior, and wiring a dedicated perf workflow with explicit reporting.
root_cause: The new perf gate still trusted stale or failing baselines and compared volatile benchmark metrics too strictly, making the regression signal unreliable.
fix_approach: Fail invalid baselines explicitly, filter benchmark-owned noisy metrics, stabilize fg03/fg08 script behavior, refresh the canonical baseline, and add workflow summary/coverage improvements.

validation.notes: Perf baseline check now passes against a freshly captured baseline and avoids treating invalid baseline failures as acceptable state.
